category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an IMAP message processor/filter; official README describes IMAP mail filtering.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name IMAPFilter; source_facts.name provides the package identifier imapfilter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents description, installation, and references to manual pages/configuration examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe IMAP message processing/filtering and Lua-based configuration/extension.
